zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabella Drummond於1405年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾斯鐵爾時，她的父親Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall15歲，母親Margaret Ruthven6歲。她於1420年之前與Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabella Drummond于1405年出生在苏格兰洛包爾斯鐵爾时，她的父亲Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall15岁，母亲Margaret Ruthven6岁。她于1420年之前与Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Annabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabelle
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabella Drummond was born in 1405, in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, her father, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, was 15 and her mother, Margaret Ruthven, was 6. She married Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill before 1420. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabella Drummond est née en 1405, à Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ruthven, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill avant 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabella Drummond 1405 in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall 15 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ruthven 6. Sie hat vor 1420 Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Drummond è nata il nel 1405 nel Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Margaret Ruthven, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill prima del 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabella Drummondが1405年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアスティトチルで生まれた時，父Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhallは15歳，母Margaret Ruthvenは6歳であった。1420年以前にRoger Gordon 4th Of Stitchillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabella Drummond(이)가 1405년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 스티트치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ruthven(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1420년 이전 Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Drummond nasceu em 1405, em Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ruthven, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill antes 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabella Drummond родилась в 1405 г. в местности стичилл, роксбургшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ruthven, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill перед 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabella Drummond nació en 1405, en Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Margaret Ruthven, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Roger Gordon 4th Of Stitchill antes de 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
